zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Seton of Gordon於大約1405年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利時，她的父親Alexander Seton Lord Gordon24歲，母親Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon22歲。她於1425年與Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross在英國蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年在她的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Seton of Gordon于大约1405年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利时，她的父亲Alexander Seton Lord Gordon24岁，母亲Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon22岁。她于1425年与Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross在英国苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年在她的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Seton of Gordon was born about 1405, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, was 22. She married Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross in 1425, in Clackmannanshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1449, in her hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Seton of Gordon est née environ 1405, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross en 1425, à Clackmannanshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Seton of Gordon um 1405 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Seton Lord Gordon 24 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon 22. Sie hat 1425 in Clackmannanshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1449 im Alter von 45 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Seton of Gordon è nata il circa 1405 nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross nel 1425, nel Clackmannanshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1449, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Seton of Gordonが約1405年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで生まれた時，父Alexander Seton Lord Gordonは24歳，母Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordonは22歳であった。1425年にイギリススコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアでAlexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年に故郷で45歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Seton of Gordon(이)가 대략 1405년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Seton Lord Gordon(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 스코틀랜드 클랙먼아실르에서 Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 그녀의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Seton of Gordon nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross em 1425, em Clackmannanshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1449, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Western Isles, Strathclyde, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Seton of Gordon родилась около 1405 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Seton Lord Gordon было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross в 1425 г. в местности клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1449 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Seton of Gordon nació aproximadamente 1405, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Seton Lord Gordon, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gordon Heiress of Gordon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alexander MacDonald of Islay, 3rd Lord of the Isles, 11th Earl of Ross en 1425, en Clackmannanshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1449, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
